outcome_summary: Phase 5 aesthetics seed (P5-06) lands at S-0068 — first aesthetics migration; closes the aesthetics subdomain. 27 nodes + 32 edges across seven clusters: foundation (4) covering aesthetics (the field umbrella spanning natural and artistic aesthetic phenomena), aesthetic_experience (Kant/Schopenhauer/Stolnitz/Beardsley/Walton; the disunity worry per Dickie 1965 against Beardsley), aesthetic_property (Sibley 1959 'Aesthetic Concepts'; realism vs anti-realism; supervenience-without-reduction), aesthetic_judgment (Kant's third Critique 1790 made the puzzle central — singular but purportedly universal); definition of art (6) covering art (the 'what is art?' question), imitation_theory_art (Plato Republic Books 3+10 critical / Aristotle Poetics affirmative), expression_theory_art (Tolstoy 1898 / Collingwood 1938 / Wollheim 1968), formalism_artistic (Bell 1914 'significant form' / Fry), institutional_theory_of_art (Dickie 1974), historical_theory_of_art (Levinson 1979); aesthetic value & taste (4) covering aesthetic_value (experiential vs property-based, intrinsic vs instrumental axes), taste_aesthetic (Hume 1757 'Of the Standard of Taste'), aesthetic_disinterest (Kant first moment / Stolnitz 1960; Dickie 1964 critique), sublime (Burke 1757 / Kant 1790 mathematically + dynamically); Kantian aesthetics (2) covering kantian_aesthetic_judgment (the four moments: disinterest, universality, purposiveness without purpose, necessity), free_play_imagination_understanding (the transcendental answer); representation & meaning (4) covering pictorial_representation (Goodman 1968 vs resemblance theorists; Wollheim alternative), depiction (Wollheim seeing-in; two-foldedness), expression_in_art (Wollheim 1968; Goodman metaphorical exemplification / Davies / Robinson / Kivy contour theory), metaphor (Black 1962 interaction / Goodman cognitivist; Searle/Grice pragmatic; Davidson 1978 causalist); ontology of artworks (4) covering ontology_of_artworks (multiple-instances puzzle; Platonist vs creationist vs nominalist), type_token_artworks_distinction (Wolterstorff vs Levinson vs Goodman vs Currie), fictional_truth (Walton 1990 make-believe / Lewis 1978 modal-realist), ontology_musical_works (Levinson 1980 indicated-structure-as-of-time-T-by-composer-C creationism); criticism & interpretation (3) covering art_criticism (description, interpretation, evaluation, contextualization), intentionalism_artistic (Hirsch strong / Stecker moderate / Levinson hypothetical), anti_intentionalism (Wimsatt-Beardsley 1946 'The Intentional Fallacy'). DAG rooted at aesthetics; 27/27 INTERPRETED; within-domain edges only. graph_version 10→11. **Second load-bearing routine-mode exercise of engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper** per ADR 0055 (first was S-0066) — single-call apply succeeded cleanly: shape verified (filename pattern, contract header, BEGIN/COMMIT, scope_lock honored), body applied via psycopg autocommit, recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version `20260505183147`. Pre-apply awk-grep escape sweep across non-comment lines clean (40 escaped apostrophes; 950 single quotes balanced; check_target.py P5-06 PASS both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes); validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 267 soft-warns (262 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C partial-seed shape with 273 total nodes; 5 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace plus 3 routine-collision flags carrying forward). **Boot-time freshness intervention**: routine_boot_freshness.py fast-forwarded local main 6 commits to origin/main at boot (S-0066 + S-0067 had landed since the worktree was last synced; local register_state.json was stale showing next_id=0066 last_claimed=S-0065; post-fast-forward state correct as next_id=0068 last_claimed=S-0067). Boot-time check_routine_scope.py --plan returned 'not in routine mode (no in_progress task)' as expected pre-claim. Two-commit deliverable pattern continued. 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. Sub-range slots 0111-0119 left reserved (granularity principle achieved within 0110; reserved for future Phase 6+ extension if telemetry warrants additional aesthetics concepts — environmental aesthetics, everyday aesthetics, philosophy of dance/literature/film, evolutionary aesthetics, ugliness, aesthetic emotion, aesthetic cognitivism, conceptual art and post-Duchamp ontology, performance art, aesthetic testimony). All three lifecycle pushes succeeded via routine_lifecycle_push.py (eager-claim, deliverable, close — wrapper's T1-A long-confirmed since S-0061). Forward state: P5-06 complete; aesthetics fully seeded; P5-07b (Philosophy of mind consciousness/specialized — depends_on [P5-01a, P5-07a] satisfied since S-0066), P5-08 (Philosophy of language), P5-09 (Philosophy of science), P5-10 (Service nodes) all pending and parallel-eligible; next routine fire's eligibility walk picks P5-07b in walk order. Phase 5 progress: 10/16 tasks complete (P5-01a, P5-01b, P5-02a, P5-02b, P5-03, P5-04a, P5-04b, P5-05, P5-06, P5-07a); 10 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C — 8 sub-tasks remaining.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was 27 nodes / ~32 edges across the seven core aesthetics clusters (foundation/definition-of-art/aesthetic-value-and-taste/Kantian/representation-and-meaning/ontology-of-artworks/criticism-and-interpretation); delivered exactly 27 nodes and 32 edges, matching the cluster decomposition (4 foundation + 6 definition-of-art + 4 aesthetic-value-and-taste + 2 Kantian + 4 representation-and-meaning + 4 ontology-of-artworks + 3 criticism-and-interpretation = 27). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended at the chronological tail (heading-list index entry remains in-place at existing position per the file's growing-by-section pattern). Migration applied to paideia-dev via the apply_migration.py wrapper in a single call (no chunked-execute_sql fallback needed); recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505183147. graph_version 10→11 honored. confidence_level distribution 27/27 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Pre-apply awk-grep SQL escape-bug sweep across non-comment lines clean (40 escaped apostrophes; 950 single quotes balanced). check_target.py --task-id P5-06 passes both criteria (migration_applied PASS; validate_passes PASS, exit 1 = soft-warns only). validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 267 soft-warns (262 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C partial-seed shape with 273 total nodes; 5 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace plus 3 routine-collision flags). Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 65ebe2e + deliverable 1c7ad4a + close). Sub-range slots 0111-0119 left reserved. **Second load-bearing routine-mode exercise of apply_migration.py wrapper succeeded cleanly**: continues to confirm the subprocess-bypass pattern from ADR 0055 works repeatably in routine context — wrapper performed shape verification, applied body via psycopg autocommit, INSERTed schema_migrations row, all without harness gate firing. **Boot-time freshness intervention**: routine_boot_freshness.py fast-forwarded local main 6 commits to origin/main at boot — necessary because the worktree's local state was 6 commits behind origin (S-0066 routine + S-0067 interactive had landed since this worktree last synced); ADR 0052 boot-freshness mechanism worked as designed.

side_discoveries: Boot-time freshness intervention required: routine_boot_freshness.py fast-forwarded local main 6 commits to origin/main at S-0068 boot. Local register_state.json was stale (next_id=0066 last_claimed=S-0065) — but origin/main had advanced through S-0066 (routine P5-07a) + S-0067 (interactive P5-06 unblock). The routine_boot_freshness.py mechanism from ADR 0052 worked as designed; this is the cleanest exercise of the freshness gate yet (routine_boot_freshness recovered cleanly without falling into the routine_eager_claim_recovery shape, since origin/main HEAD was a clean post-close state, not a rival eager-claim). The intervention is worth flagging only because it confirms the gate continues to handle the worktree-stale scenario without operator intervention.

Second load-bearing routine-mode exercise of engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper succeeded cleanly. ADR 0055 introduced the wrapper at S-0064; S-0066 was the first load-bearing exercise; S-0068 is the second. The 0110_seed_aesthetics_part1.sql migration body fits a single apply_migration.py wrapper invocation comfortably (~45 KB total file, ~30 KB executable SQL excluding the contract block; well below the chunked-apply threshold S-0058+ encountered for ~70 KB+ payloads). The wrapper's subprocess-bypass pattern continues to work repeatably in routine context — confirms ADR 0055's hypothesis is durable, not a one-time success.

commits.summary: eager-claim S-0068 — routine task P5-06 Aesthetics seed
